results.prompt: Every day at 8am, send an email reminder to team@company.com saying "Stand-up in 30 minutes"
When a webhook receives a POST request, return a JSON response with { "status": "ok" }
Every Monday at 9am, post "Weekly sync time!" to a Slack channel called #engineering
When a form is submitted via webhook, save the data to a Google Sheet
results.workflowName: Webhook Form Submission → Save to Google Sheet

results.prompt: Every hour, make a GET request to https://api.example.com/health and log the result
Send a Telegram message saying "Build complete" when a webhook is triggered
results.workflowName: Send Telegram Message on Webhook Trigger

results.prompt: Every 5 minutes, check https://httpbin.org/status/200 and alert on failure via email
results.workflowName: HTTP Health Check — Alert on Failure

results.prompt: When receiving a webhook, extract the "name" field and respond with "Hello, {name}"
Schedule a daily report email at 6pm with a summary from an HTTP API endpoint
Receive a webhook with user data, validate the email field, and return success/failure
Receive a webhook with order data, check if total > 100, send a Slack alert for high-value orders, otherwise log to a spreadsheet
results.workflowName: Order Webhook Handler — High-Value Alert vs. Spreadsheet Log

results.prompt: Every morning at 7am, fetch weather data from an API, format it nicely, and post to Slack #general
results.workflowName: Daily Morning Weather Report to Slack

results.prompt: When a webhook receives a support ticket, classify priority based on keywords, route high-priority to Slack and low-priority to email
Receive a webhook POST, call https://httpbin.org/json, merge the response with the original data, and return the combined result
results.workflowName: Webhook POST → Fetch httpbin.org/json → Merge & Respond

results.prompt: Every day at midnight, fetch all GitHub issues from a repo, filter open ones, and send a summary email
results.workflowName: Daily GitHub Open Issues Summary Email

results.prompt: When a new email arrives, extract attachments, upload them to S3, and send a confirmation Slack message
results.workflowName: Email Attachments → S3 Upload → Slack Confirmation

results.prompt: Receive a webhook with product data, check inventory levels, send restock alerts for items below threshold
Every 30 minutes, poll an RSS feed, check for new entries, and post new items to a Slack channel
When triggered by webhook, look up a customer in a database, enrich with external API data, and return the profile
results.workflowName: Webhook → Customer Lookup → Enrich → Return Profile

results.prompt: Receive form submissions via webhook, validate required fields, store valid entries in Airtable, respond with status
